title: Ensure whitespace in-between braces in template directives
description: This rule raises an issue when template directives do not have a whitespace after the opening braces and before the closing braces. It’s based on best practices in Helm and emphasizes the importance of maintaining this whitespace for better readability and understanding of the code. The absence of whitespace in template directives in Helm can lead to several issues: Readability: Code is read more often than it is written.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
